ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "contest_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the contest starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the contest ends */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the contest in minutes */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for participants to register for the contest */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contest is visible to all participants */,
  "rank_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants ranked in this contest */,
  "total_solved" INTEGER /* Total number of problems solved during the contest */,
  "rating_change" INTEGER /* Change in rating for participants after the contest */,
  "new_rating" INTEGER /* New rating for participants after the contest */,
  "contest_type" TEXT /* Type of contest (e.g., Div. 1, Div. 2, Educational) */,
  "contest_level" TEXT /* Level of the contest (e.g., Div. 1, Div. 2) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who created the contest */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the participant */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the participant's profile picture */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the participant (e.g., Admin, Participant) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the participant's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest in which the submission was made */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being solved */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Accepted, Wrong Answer) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score received for the submission */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "submission_code" TEXT /* Code submitted by the participant */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the submission to execute (in milliseconds) */,
  "memory_used" INTEGER /* Memory used by the submission (in bytes) */,
  "test_case_passed" INTEGER /* Number of test cases passed by the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest to which the problem belongs */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the problem */,
  "solution_link" TEXT /* Link to the solution or editorial for the problem */,
  "problem_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "input_format" TEXT /* Format of the input for the problem */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Format of the output for the problem */,
  "sample_input" TEXT /* Sample input for the problem */,
  "sample_output" TEXT /* Sample output for the problem */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or categories for the problem (e.g., Graph, DP) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who created the problem */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose rating is recorded */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest that influenced the rating change */,
  "old_rating" INTEGER /* Previous rating before the contest */,
  "new_rating" INTEGER /* New rating after the contest */,
  "rating_change" INTEGER /* Change in rating as a result of the contest */,
  "contest_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the specific contest */,
  "contest_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the participant in the specific contest */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the rating record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of contest */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest type (e.g., Rated, Educational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contest type */,
  "is_rated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contest type is rated */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contest type is visible to all participants */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who created the contest type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the contest type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest for which feedback is provided */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the contest (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the participant */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Participant) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest history record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the participant in the contest */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score achieved in the contest */,
  "problems_solved" INTEGER /* Number of problems solved by the participant in the contest */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Total time taken by the participant to solve all problems */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contest history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the contest history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_history_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_history_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read by the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
